passiveAbilities.name: Concealed Dagger
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1. If this character plays a Rising Attack increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

activeAbilities.name: Victimise
activeAbilities.description: Target gets +2 Evade Stat until end of turn.

arcaneAbilities.name: Vitality Draw
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target loses X energy. A friendly model within 8" and LoS of this model gains that much energy.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 3 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Incubus
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target enemy suffers X Wds. A friendly model within 8" and LoS of this model restores that many Wds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 3 Wds.
